message:
fix: trim right-side CRT black strip from hero video

Re-cropped both video files from 1728x972 to 1428x972, removing the
300px black CRT border on the right edge. The video is now slightly
taller than 16:9 (1.47:1), so object-cover in the aspect-video
container naturally clips ~70px from top+bottom, which also hides
the minor bottom CRT border.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
